recommendations.oldSessionsSubtitle: Some sessions haven't been used in over 30 days

payments.title: Payments & subscriptions
payments.subtitle: Manage your payment methods, subscriptions, and wallets.

wallet.subtitle: Your in-app wallet for Oxy services
wallet.oxyPaySubtitle: Balance: {{balance}} — Pay for subscriptions, services, and features
wallet.fairwalletSubtitle: Direct FairCoin payments via QR code scanning

methods.cardEmpty: Secure card payments — No card on file
methods.oxyPaySubtitle: Balance: {{balance}} — Use your in-app wallet balance
methods.fairwalletSubtitle: Pay with FairCoin via QR code

expanded.cardBody: Secure card payments processed through Oxy services. Your card details are encrypted and handled by secure payment processors. Cards are charged when purchasing subscriptions or services.
expanded.oxyPayBody: Your in-app wallet uses FairCoin as the base currency. Use your balance to pay for subscriptions, premium features, and services within the Oxy ecosystem. Your current balance is displayed at the top of this screen.
expanded.fairwalletBody: FAIRWallet enables direct FairCoin payments via QR code scanning. When making a payment, choose FAIRWallet as your payment method and scan the generated QR code with your FairCoin wallet app. Transactions use blockchain technology for transparency and security.

history.noBillingSubtitle: Your payments and invoices will appear here
history.noTransactionsSubtitle: Your wallet transactions will appear here

info.fairCoinBody: FairCoin is the base cryptocurrency used across all Oxy services. All transactions, including subscriptions, services, and in-app purchases, are denominated in FairCoin.
info.oxyPayBody: Oxy Pay is your in-app wallet that stores your FairCoin balance. Use it to pay for subscriptions, premium features, and services within the Oxy ecosystem. Your balance is displayed at the top of this screen.
info.fairwalletBody: FAIRWallet enables direct FairCoin payments via QR code scanning. When making a payment, you can choose FAIRWallet as your payment method and scan the generated QR code with your FairCoin wallet app.
info.securityBody: All payments are processed securely through Oxy services. Your payment information is encrypted and never stored on your device. Credit card details are handled by secure payment processors, and cryptocurrency transactions use blockchain technology for transparency and security.
info.paymentMethodsBody: You can pay using Credit/Debit Cards, Oxy Pay wallet balance, or FAIRWallet. When purchasing subscriptions or services, the payment gateway will guide you through the process and allow you to choose your preferred payment method.

fairCoinBanner.title: FairCoin Wallet
fairCoinBanner.description: A self-custody cryptocurrency wallet for managing your FairCoin. You control your keys and funds independently from Oxy services.
fairCoinBanner.openMessage: Please visit https://fairco.in/wallet to learn more about FAIRWallet.

storage.subtitle: Manage your storage usage and files.
storage.signInRequired: Sign in to see your storage usage.
storage.usageShared: Your storage is shared across Oxy Photos, Oxy Drive, and Oxy Mail.

a11y.logoHint: Tap to go home, double tap to scroll to top

scanQr.identityRequiredBody:
To scan QR codes and authorize sign-in requests, you need to create or import an identity.

Identity creation is only available on native platforms (iOS/Android). Please use the mobile app to set up your identity.
scanQr.permissionBody: To scan QR codes for sign-in authorization, we need access to your camera.
scanQr.instructions: Scan the QR code shown in the app you want to sign in to
scanQr.invalidBody: This QR code is not a valid Oxy authorization request.

authorize.permissionsTitle: This app will be able to:
authorize.authorizedSuccess: Authorized {{app}} to access your Oxy identity.

errors.alreadyProcessed: This authorization request has already been processed or expired
errors.noSession: No active session. Please sign in first.
